title: polygala japonica
intro: Polygala japonica, also known as Japanese milkwort, is a perennial plant native to East Asia that belongs to the polygalaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polygala japonica include its ability to improve respiratory function, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including bronchitis and asthma.
